name: compleanno
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ffmpeg python3 curl ca-certificates && sudo curl -fsSL -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp && sudo chmod a+rx /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && npm ci
